steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The passage emphasizes both women’s roles and tenure as lighthouse keepers during overlapping time periods.

The decisive clue is the shared occupation and timeframe noted in the student’s research: both were keepers for over two decades during the late 1800s to early 1900s.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice C directly pairs their shared job title (lighthouse keeper) with their overlapping service years (late nineteenth to early twentieth centuries), aligning with the research notes.

The other three either focus narrowly on one example (B, D) or state a general fact irrelevant to their similarity (A).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
